title: cyperus clarkeanus
intro: Cyperus clarkeanus, also known as Clarke's sedge, is a species of plant in the sedge family that is native to Sri Lanka. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyperus clarkeanus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in traditional herbal remedies such as teas and tinctures.
